title: Saudi Arabian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Saudi Arabia, made with tender lamb and a rich blend of spices.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb cubes in batches, then set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and sauté the onion, garlic, and ginger until the onion is translucent.
Add the cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and black pepper; cook for 1 minute.
Add the browned lamb, salt, and 2 cups of water; bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven; braise for 2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Skim off excess fat and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
